title: festuca racemosa var. commutata
intro: Festuca racemosa var. commutata, also known as a type of mountain grass or blue fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Festuca racemosa var. commutata are primarily found in its roots and rhizomes, which contain compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Festuca racemosa var. commutata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
